unit.name: Sable
unit.gameplay_identity: Marksman calibration unit carrying Vindicator, Scholar through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.supernatural_cost: shots erase words from memory and burn citation scars across the aiming eye

psychology.core_wound: A real grievance was dismissed because they could not produce evidence in the form authority demanded.
psychology.private_want: They want one undeniable proof that forces every witness to admit they were right.
psychology.primary_fear: Contradictory evidence will reveal that certainty has replaced truth and erase the grievance sustaining them.
psychology.survival_strategy: They turn every feeling into evidence and every person into a target that can confirm it.
psychology.villainous_distortion: People are shot, cited, and reduced to proof until no independent account can survive.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Cold moral satisfaction under a tightly suppressed flicker of doubt.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Unwavering evidentiary certainty versus fear that one contradiction will dissolve the self built around it.
psychology.face_direction: The aiming eye fixes the target as proof; the scarred eye narrows against contradiction, lips compress with moral satisfaction, and one cheek holds denied doubt.
psychology.pose_direction: The whole lean wedge converges along the extreme rifle line; ash witness-cloth and proof strips form a mobile field archive rather than a tactical uniform.
psychology.forbidden_read: No generic scowl, ordinary soldier, black catsuit, sexy sniper stereotype, righteous hero, angry revenge eye, or librarian costume.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Cold moral satisfaction under a tightly suppressed flicker of doubt.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: They want one undeniable proof that forces every witness to admit they were right.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares sable directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for sable: A mature androgynous precision villain reads clearly without soldier-hero or sniper-pinup drift.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, sable meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for sable: Witness cloth, steel, parchment strips, wax, and scar tissue remain dry and distinct.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, sable meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for sable: Every body and garment line converges into one evidentiary rifle vector.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, sable meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for sable: Footnote rifle, proof laminates, eye scar, and ash field-cloth avoid costume convergence.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, sable meets or exceeds the professional floor for distinctiveness.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for sable: Triptych, definitive master, face crop, exact derivative, and lineage checks are complete.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, sable meets or exceeds the professional floor for completeness_and_downstream_usability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for sable: The extreme horizontal rifle and forward wedge remain unmistakable at exact 96px.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for sable: Fixed aiming eye, narrowed scarred eye, compressed lips, and cheek tension show righteous certainty.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, sable meets or exceeds the professional floor for psychology_and_villain_read.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for sable: Vindicator's committed line leads; Scholar appears only in laminated proof strips.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, sable meets or exceeds the professional floor for production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
